generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Processes sensor data to produce crane state metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateMetricsDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement using TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist movement using TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers at hoist end"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateMetricsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Arduino
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CraneStateMetricsTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series crane state metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateMetricsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model for MBSE using Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance DarTwinEvolutionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System evolution model using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CapellaEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories based on kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance RealtimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measurements vs. simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorAlertForValidationThresholdBreach
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical time-series data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based visualization dashboard for real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealtimeTrajectoryTracesWithConfidenceBoundsInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for crane movement"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation results for crane dynamics"
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data successfully logged to TimescaleDB for historical analysis"
]

instance RealtimeTrajectoryTracesWithConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance OperatorAlertForValidationThresholdBreach : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator alert triggered when validation thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
        RealtimeSimulationService,
        ContinuousValidationService,
        HistoricalDataLoggingService,
        VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService,
        VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for kinematic and simulation modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService,
        RealtimeSimulationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia modeling and system evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealtimeSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database component for time-series data storage"
]

instance GrafanaDashboardComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard component for data visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trajectory generator service component"
]

instance SimulationServiceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation service component"
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service component"
]

instance MQTTBrokerComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT broker component"
]

instance HostComputerEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Personal computer hosting digital twin components"
    base:contains TimescaleDBComponent, GrafanaDashboardComponent, TrajectoryGeneratorServiceComponent, SimulationServiceComponent, ContinuousValidationServiceComponent, MQTTBrokerComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface to control motor controllers and electromagnet movements, enabling precise physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logged and validated at operational speeds, where trajectory execution and simulation comparisons occur instantaneously during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized system where physical crane hardware interfaces with Python-based control applications, and digital services (Docker containers) handle data flow, simulation, validation, and visualization, all hosted on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated (real-time monitoring and validation of physical crane during operational use, including fault detection and trajectory execution in live scenarios)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real trajectory measurements and simulated trajectories, comparing against predefined thresholds to ensure model accuracy and detect discrepancies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based Physical Crane Interface for hardware control, with data flows between sensors, controllers, and digital services via MQTT topics."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All services deployed on a single personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard, with gantrylib Python module for core logic and a single docker-compose command for setup."
]
